description: Create a content slide titled Research snapshot with a two-column layout: imagery on the left and a narrative text block on the right.

right.body: Each year, Accenture Song’s global network of designers, creatives, technologists, sociologists, and anthropologists across 50+ design studios and creative agencies watch out for signals in their countries. We synthesize their thoughts, discuss them with futurists and academics and shape them into trends. External, in-depth interviews with people in eight countries tell us whether and how the trends are manifesting, in their own words. We combine these insights with an extensive online survey of 24,295 people across 22 markets to shape these final trends.

footer.source: For more information, please see page 89. Accenture Life Trends 2025
